mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `like` ( user_id, obj_id, obj_type, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{objId}, #{objType}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT d.*, cc1.code_name AS categoryName, cc2.code_name AS typeName, i.file_url AS imageUrl, IFNULL( ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(tn.rating), 1) FROM tasting_note tn WHERE tn.drink_id = d.drink_id AND tn.is_deleted = 'N' ), 0 ) AS avgRating FROM `like` l
JOIN drink d ON l.obj_id = d.drink_id
LEFT JOIN image i ON i.obj_type = 'NOTE' AND i.obj_id = d.drink_id
LEFT JOIN common_code cc1 ON d.category_code = cc1.code AND cc1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND cc1.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc2 ON d.type_code = cc2.code AND cc2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc2.use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.obj_type = 'DRINK' AND d.is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY l.created_at DESC

SELECT tn.*, d.drink_name, d.category_code AS categoryCode, i.file_url AS imageUrl FROM `like` l
JOIN tasting_note tn ON l.obj_id = tn.note_id
JOIN drink d ON tn.drink_id = d.drink_id
LEFT JOIN image i ON i.obj_type = 'NOTE' AND i.obj_id = tn.note_id
WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.obj_type = 'NOTE' AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'
